title: gilia insignis
intro: Gilia insignis, also known as Mountain Pride or Insignis Gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gilia insignis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Gilia insignis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
